items.title: Team Collaboration is Here
items.content_html:
We're excited to announce the launch of Team Collaboration — the most requested feature from our community.

What's New

Multi-User Workspaces

  • Invite up to 5 team members per workspace
  • Role-based permissions (Admin, Editor, Viewer)
  • Real-time collaboration with live cursors

Activity Log

Track every change in your workspace:

  • See who made what changes and when
  • Filter by user, action type, or date range
  • Export logs for compliance

API Access

Team plans now include full API access:

curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $API_KEY" \
  https://api.changelog.page/v1/entries

Pricing

Team Collaboration is available on our Team plan at $49/month. Existing Pro customers can upgrade anytime.

Upgrade to Team →

items.title: Three New Themes Available
items.content_html:
We've added three beautiful new themes to make your changelogs stand out even more.

Meet the New Themes

Minimal

Clean, typography-focused design that puts your content first. Perfect for developer tools and API products.

Cards

Visual, card-based layout with subtle shadows and hover effects. Great for consumer SaaS products.

Timeline

Vertical timeline layout with accent dots and connecting lines. Ideal for products with frequent updates.

How to Switch

  1. Open your changelog settings
  2. Navigate to Appearance
  3. Select your preferred theme
  4. Changes deploy automatically

All themes are fully responsive and support dark mode.

What's Next?

We're working on:

  • Custom CSS injection (coming May)
  • Theme marketplace for community themes
  • Color scheme customization

Have a theme idea? Let us know!

items.title: Bug Fixes & Performance Improvements
items.content_html:
We've squashed some bugs and improved performance across the board.

Fixed Issues

RSS Feed Validation

  • Fixed invalid date formatting in RSS feeds
  • All feeds now pass W3C validation
  • Added proper lastBuildDate element

Mobile Layout

  • Fixed horizontal scroll on small screens
  • Improved touch targets for navigation
  • Better font scaling on iOS devices

Build Performance

  • Reduced build time by 40%
  • Better memory usage for large changelogs
  • Fixed memory leak in watch mode

Performance Improvements

Metric Before After
Build time (100 entries) 4.2s 2.5s
Memory usage 180MB 95MB
Bundle size 45KB 38KB

All changes are live now. No action required on your end.

items.title: Changelog.page is Live on Product Hunt!
items.content_html:
🎉 We're live on Product Hunt!

After 4 weeks of building, iterating, and testing with our beta users, we're thrilled to officially launch Changelog.page to the world.

What We Built

Changelog.page is the beautiful, affordable changelog tool for SaaS founders. Unlike expensive widgets (Headway $29+, Beamer $49+), we generate static changelogs that:

  • Load instantly on global CDN
  • Rank on Google (SEO-optimized)
  • Cost $15/mo instead of $50

Launch Day Stats

In the first 24 hours:

  • 🗳️ 247 upvotes on Product Hunt
  • 👥 89 new signups
  • 💳 3 paid customers

Special Launch Offer

For the next 48 hours, get 30% off your first year with code:

PHLAUNCH30

Support us on Product Hunt →

Thank you to everyone who supported our launch! 🙏
